ai-900.title: AI-900 Azure AI Fundamentals Practice Exam

topics.name: Describe Artificial Intelligence workloads and considerations
modules: Identify features of common AI workloads
Identify guiding principles for Responsible AI

topics.name: Describe fundamental principles of machine learning on Azure
modules: Identify core tasks in creating a machine learning solution
Describe capabilities of no-code machine learning with Azure Machine Learning

topics.name: Describe features of computer vision workloads on Azure
modules: Identify common types of computer vision solution
Identify Azure tools and services for computer vision tasks

topics.name: Describe features of Natural Language Processing workloads on Azure
modules: Identify features of common NLP workload scenarios
Identify Azure tools and services for NLP workloads

topics.name: Describe features of knowledge mining and document intelligence workloads on Azure
modules: Identify features of knowledge mining workloads
Identify Azure services for knowledge mining and document intelligence

questions.question: Which of the following best describes supervised learning?
options: Learning from labeled examples to predict outcomes
Learning by trial and error via rewards
questions.explanation: Supervised learning uses labeled datasets to learn input-output mappings for classification or regression.

reasoning.correct: Supervised learning uses labeled datasets to learn input-output mappings for classification or regression.

why_others_wrong.1: Unsupervised learning finds structure without labels such as clusters.
why_others_wrong.2: Translation is a task leveraging language models, not a learning paradigm.
why_others_wrong.3: Translation is a task leveraging language models, not a learning paradigm.

questions.question: Which option Responsible AI principle focuses on ensuring systems work as intended and can be trusted?
questions.explanation: Reliability and safety ensure AI systems perform as expected and fail gracefully.

reasoning.correct: Reliability and safety ensure AI systems perform as expected and fail gracefully.

why_others_wrong.0: Fairness addresses bias and equitable outcomes.
why_others_wrong.2: Transparency emphasizes explainability and disclosure.
why_others_wrong.3: Transparency emphasizes explainability and disclosure.

questions.question: What type of machine learning predicts a continuous value?
questions.explanation: Regression predicts continuous numeric values.

reasoning.correct: Regression predicts continuous numeric values.

why_others_wrong.0: Classification predicts discrete categories, not continuous values.
why_others_wrong.2: Reinforcement learning optimizes actions via rewards.
why_others_wrong.3: Reinforcement learning optimizes actions via rewards.

questions.question: Identify the best choice is the primary benefit of Automated ML (AutoML) in Azure ML?
questions.explanation: AutoML automates model selection and hyperparameter tuning for supported tasks.

reasoning.correct: AutoML automates model selection and hyperparameter tuning for supported tasks.

why_others_wrong.0: Data lakes concern storage architectures, not AutoML.
why_others_wrong.2: UI design is unrelated to Azure ML.
why_others_wrong.3: UI design is unrelated to Azure ML.

questions.question: Select the correct answer is the main purpose of a compute cluster in Azure ML?
options: Serve as a data labeling tool
Provide scalable compute for training and batch inference
questions.explanation: Compute clusters scale nodes to run training and batch workloads efficiently.

reasoning.correct: Compute clusters scale nodes to run training and batch workloads efficiently.

why_others_wrong.0: Labeling tools are separate; clusters run workloads.
why_others_wrong.2: DevOps pipelines are separate from Azure ML compute.
why_others_wrong.3: DevOps pipelines are separate from Azure ML compute.

questions.question: Choose the statement dataset split helps tune models and prevent overfitting before final testing?
questions.explanation: Validation sets guide hyperparameter tuning prior to final test evaluation.

reasoning.correct: Validation sets guide hyperparameter tuning prior to final test evaluation.

why_others_wrong.0: The training set is used to fit parameters.
why_others_wrong.2: Logs are operational, not for training.
why_others_wrong.3: Logs are operational, not for training.

questions.question: Pick the option practice helps reduce overfitting and improve generalization?
questions.explanation: Regularization and cross-validation reduce overfitting and improve generalization.

reasoning.correct: Regularization and cross-validation reduce overfitting and improve generalization.

why_others_wrong.0: Increasing complexity often worsens overfitting.
why_others_wrong.2: Noisy labels degrade model quality.
why_others_wrong.3: Noisy labels degrade model quality.

questions.question: From the options below, which evaluation metrics are most appropriate to assess an imbalanced binary classifier? (Choose two)
questions.explanation: Precision and recall are robust for imbalance; accuracy can be misleading; RMSE is for regression.

reasoning.correct: Precision and recall are robust for imbalance; accuracy can be misleading; RMSE is for regression.

why_others_wrong.2: RMSE is not used for classification tasks.
why_others_wrong.3: RMSE is not used for classification tasks.

questions.question: In this scenario, which scenario best represents a typical machine learning prediction task?
options: Predicting next month’s sales based on history
Translating text from English to Spanish
questions.explanation: Predicting a future numeric value based on historical data is a classical ML task.

reasoning.correct: Predicting a future numeric value based on historical data is a classical ML task.

why_others_wrong.0: Speech-to-text is a speech service capability.
why_others_wrong.1: Clustering is unsupervised grouping without a predictive target.
why_others_wrong.3: Translation is a language service capability.

questions.question: Among these, which Azure AI service extracts printed or handwritten text from images and documents?
questions.explanation: The Read OCR capability extracts text from images and PDFs.

reasoning.correct: The Read OCR capability extracts text from images and PDFs.

why_others_wrong.0: Custom Vision trains custom image classifiers/detectors, not OCR.
why_others_wrong.2: Azure AI Search indexes content; it does not perform OCR.
why_others_wrong.3: Azure AI Search indexes content; it does not perform OCR.

questions.question: Which of the following should you choose Custom Vision over prebuilt Computer Vision models?
options: For generic object detection supported by prebuilt models
For domain-specific objects not covered by prebuilt models
questions.explanation: Custom Vision is for training domain-specific classifiers or detectors using labeled images.

reasoning.correct: Custom Vision is for training domain-specific classifiers or detectors using labeled images.

why_others_wrong.0: Prebuilt models often cover generic objects.
why_others_wrong.2: Face verification is handled by Face API.
why_others_wrong.3: Face verification is handled by Face API.

questions.question: Which option capability is provided by Face API?
questions.explanation: Face API detects faces and can return attributes such as emotion and landmarks.

reasoning.correct: Face API detects faces and can return attributes such as emotion and landmarks.

why_others_wrong.0: Pose estimation is not the Face API’s focus at AI-900 level.
why_others_wrong.2: OCR is a Computer Vision Read capability.
why_others_wrong.3: OCR is a Computer Vision Read capability.

questions.question: What feature detects objects and returns bounding boxes and labels?
questions.explanation: Object detection returns coordinates and class labels for detected instances.

reasoning.correct: Object detection returns coordinates and class labels for detected instances.

why_others_wrong.0: Captioning describes an image, not bounding boxes.
why_others_wrong.1: OCR extracts text.
why_others_wrong.3: Face identification is face-specific, not general object detection.

questions.question: Identify the best choice Text Analytics feature identifies the overall tone of a document?
questions.explanation: Sentiment analysis classifies text as positive, negative, mixed, or neutral.

reasoning.correct: Sentiment analysis classifies text as positive, negative, mixed, or neutral.

why_others_wrong.0: Key phrases surface important terms, not sentiment.
why_others_wrong.2: Language detection identifies the language, not sentiment.
why_others_wrong.3: Language detection identifies the language, not sentiment.

questions.question: Select the correct answer capabilities are provided by Text Analytics? (Choose two)
questions.explanation: Text Analytics includes sentiment and NER among other capabilities.

reasoning.correct: Text Analytics includes sentiment and NER among other capabilities.

why_others_wrong.2: Form recognition belongs to Document Intelligence.
why_others_wrong.3: Form recognition belongs to Document Intelligence.

questions.question: Choose the statement capability extracts names of people, organizations, and locations from text?
questions.explanation: NER identifies and classifies named entities in text.

reasoning.correct: NER identifies and classifies named entities in text.

why_others_wrong.0: Sentiment focuses on polarity, not entities.
why_others_wrong.2: Key phrases are important terms, not entities.
why_others_wrong.3: Key phrases are important terms, not entities.

questions.question: Pick the option feature redacts sensitive information such as credit card numbers and phone numbers?
questions.explanation: PII detection identifies and optionally redacts sensitive entities in text.

reasoning.correct: PII detection identifies and optionally redacts sensitive entities in text.

why_others_wrong.0: Key phrases extract salient terms, not necessarily sensitive data.
why_others_wrong.2: QnA Maker is a question answering service (now part of Language Service).
why_others_wrong.3: QnA Maker is a question answering service (now part of Language Service).

questions.question: From the options below, which feature identifies the language of a text document?
questions.explanation: Language detection predicts the primary language of input text.

reasoning.correct: Language detection predicts the primary language of input text.

why_others_wrong.0: Sentiment predicts tone, not language.
why_others_wrong.2: Summarization condenses content.
why_others_wrong.3: Summarization condenses content.

questions.question: In this scenario, which is Language Studio primarily used for?
options: Building and testing language capabilities via a web portal
questions.explanation: Language Studio is a web portal for trying and evaluating language features.

reasoning.correct: Language Studio is a web portal for trying and evaluating language features.

why_others_wrong.1: Power Apps is a low-code platform.
why_others_wrong.2: VM monitoring uses Azure Monitor.
why_others_wrong.3: VM monitoring uses Azure Monitor.

questions.question: Among these, which Speech service feature converts spoken audio to text in real time?
questions.explanation: Speech-to-text converts audio into text in near real time.

reasoning.correct: Speech-to-text converts audio into text in near real time.

why_others_wrong.0: Synthesis converts text to speech.
why_others_wrong.1: Translation converts speech between languages, not just transcription.
why_others_wrong.3: Custom Neural Voice is for TTS voice creation.

questions.question: Which of the following capability converts text to natural-sounding speech?
questions.explanation: Text-to-speech converts text to audio using neural voices.

reasoning.correct: Text-to-speech converts text to audio using neural voices.

why_others_wrong.0: Speech-to-text transcribes audio to text.
why_others_wrong.1: Translation converts across languages.
why_others_wrong.3: NER is an NLP text capability.

questions.question: Which option approach lowers latency for real-time transcription?
questions.explanation: Streaming APIs deliver partial and final results with low latency.

reasoning.correct: Streaming APIs deliver partial and final results with low latency.

why_others_wrong.0: Batch is for offline processing.
why_others_wrong.2: Email is not a valid interface for transcription.
why_others_wrong.3: Email is not a valid interface for transcription.

questions.question: What capability condenses long documents into concise summaries?
questions.explanation: Summarization condenses content to a shorter form preserving key ideas.

reasoning.correct: Summarization condenses content to a shorter form preserving key ideas.

why_others_wrong.0: Language detection identifies language, not content reduction.
why_others_wrong.2: NER extracts entities, not summaries.
why_others_wrong.3: NER extracts entities, not summaries.

questions.question: Identify the best choice practice helps mitigate bias in training data?
options: Collect data from a single demographic
Audit datasets for representation and labeling quality
questions.explanation: Bias mitigation starts with representative, well-labeled datasets audited for quality.

reasoning.correct: Bias mitigation starts with representative, well-labeled datasets audited for quality.

why_others_wrong.0: Single-demographic data increases bias risk.
why_others_wrong.2: Merging sets causes leakage and invalid evaluation.
why_others_wrong.3: Merging sets causes leakage and invalid evaluation.

questions.question: Select the correct answer term describes the input variables used by a model to make predictions?
questions.explanation: Features are the input variables; labels are the target outputs in supervised learning.

reasoning.correct: Features are the input variables; labels are the target outputs in supervised learning.

why_others_wrong.0: Label is the target output.
why_others_wrong.2: Endpoint is a deployment artifact.
why_others_wrong.3: Endpoint is a deployment artifact.

questions.question: Choose the statement learning paradigm optimizes actions through rewards and penalties?
questions.explanation: Reinforcement learning trains agents via reward signals to learn optimal policies.

reasoning.correct: Reinforcement learning trains agents via reward signals to learn optimal policies.

why_others_wrong.0: Supervised uses labeled examples.
why_others_wrong.1: Unsupervised discovers patterns without labels.
why_others_wrong.3: Transfer learning reuses knowledge from related tasks.

questions.question: Pick the option split is used for the final unbiased evaluation of a trained model?
questions.explanation: The test set is strictly held out for final performance estimation.

reasoning.correct: The test set is strictly held out for final performance estimation.

why_others_wrong.0: Training is used for fitting the model.
why_others_wrong.1: Validation is used for tuning.
why_others_wrong.3: Exploratory set is not a standard split.

questions.question: From the options below, which feature generates a natural-language description of an image?
questions.explanation: Image captioning describes images in natural language.

reasoning.correct: Image captioning describes images in natural language.

why_others_wrong.0: OCR extracts text from images.
why_others_wrong.2: Brand detection recognizes logos/brands.
why_others_wrong.3: Brand detection recognizes logos/brands.

questions.question: In this scenario, which practice improves a Custom Vision classifier’s generalization?
options: Use only images with the same background
Collect varied images per class across lighting and backgrounds
Train with as few images as possible
questions.explanation: Diverse, representative images per class improve robustness and reduce overfitting.

reasoning.correct: Diverse, representative images per class improve robustness and reduce overfitting.

why_others_wrong.0: Uniform backgrounds reduce generalization.
why_others_wrong.2: Synthetic data helps but should complement real data.
why_others_wrong.3: Synthetic data helps but should complement real data.

questions.question: Among these, which service would you choose to detect and redact sensitive information in documents?
questions.explanation: PII detection identifies sensitive entities such as credit card numbers or phone numbers.

reasoning.correct: PII detection identifies sensitive entities such as credit card numbers or phone numbers.

why_others_wrong.0: Azure OpenAI provides generative models but not built-in PII detection for text analytics pipelines.
why_others_wrong.2: Face API is for faces in images and video.
why_others_wrong.3: Face API is for faces in images and video.

questions.question: Which of the following capability identifies the key topics or important terms within a document?
questions.explanation: Key phrase extraction surfaces important terms.

reasoning.correct: Key phrase extraction surfaces important terms.

why_others_wrong.1: NER extracts named entities, not arbitrary key phrases.
why_others_wrong.2: Speech recognition is speech-to-text, not text analytics.
why_others_wrong.3: Speech recognition is speech-to-text, not text analytics.

questions.question: Which option approach best supports transparency for an AI system making eligibility decisions?
options: Provide user-facing explanations and documentation of limitations
questions.explanation: Transparency requires communicating how decisions are made, limitations, and user recourse.

reasoning.correct: Transparency requires communicating how decisions are made, limitations, and user recourse.

why_others_wrong.0: Withholding details reduces transparency.
why_others_wrong.2: Data minimization is privacy-related, not transparency.
why_others_wrong.3: Data minimization is privacy-related, not transparency.

questions.question: What term describes the target value the model is trained to predict?
questions.explanation: The label is the ground truth output in supervised learning.

reasoning.correct: The label is the ground truth output in supervised learning.

why_others_wrong.1: Noise refers to random variation in data.
why_others_wrong.2: Baseline is a simple reference model.
why_others_wrong.3: Baseline is a simple reference model.

questions.question: Identify the best choice tasks are supported by Azure Automated ML?
questions.explanation: AutoML supports supervised tasks and forecasting.

reasoning.correct: AutoML supports supervised tasks and forecasting.

why_others_wrong.1: Reinforcement learning is not supported by Azure AutoML.
why_others_wrong.2: NAS for NLP is not an AutoML capability.
why_others_wrong.3: NAS for NLP is not an AutoML capability.

questions.question: Select the correct answer service would you use to determine the language of a short chat message?
questions.explanation: Language detection predicts the language of a text sample.

reasoning.correct: Language detection predicts the language of a text sample.

why_others_wrong.1: Sentiment predicts tone, not language.
why_others_wrong.2: Speech-to-text transcribes audio.
why_others_wrong.3: Speech-to-text transcribes audio.

questions.question: Choose the statement Azure service provides access to GPT family models for text generation and chat?
questions.explanation: Azure OpenAI provides access to large language models such as GPT and embeddings.

reasoning.correct: Azure OpenAI provides access to large language models such as GPT and embeddings.

why_others_wrong.1: LUIS is retired and replaced by Conversational Language Understanding.
why_others_wrong.2: Custom Vision is for images, not text generation.
why_others_wrong.3: Custom Vision is for images, not text generation.

questions.question: Pick the option policy helps prevent harmful content when using Azure OpenAI models?
options: Content filtering and safety system messages
questions.explanation: Content filters, safety parameters, and guidance mitigate harmful outputs.

reasoning.correct: Content filters, safety parameters, and guidance mitigate harmful outputs.

why_others_wrong.0: Disabling logs does not improve safety.
why_others_wrong.2: Model size alone does not ensure safety.
why_others_wrong.3: Model size alone does not ensure safety.

why_others_wrong.3: Brand detection recognizes logos/brands.

questions.question: Which of the following practice improves a Custom Vision classifier’s generalization?
options: Use only images with the same background
Collect varied images per class across lighting and backgrounds
Train with as few images as possible
questions.explanation: Diverse, representative images per class improve robustness and reduce overfitting.

reasoning.correct: Diverse, representative images per class improve robustness and reduce overfitting.

why_others_wrong.0: Uniform backgrounds reduce generalization.
why_others_wrong.2: Synthetic data helps but should complement real data.
why_others_wrong.3: Synthetic data helps but should complement real data.

questions.question: Which option service would you choose to detect and redact sensitive information in documents?
questions.explanation: PII detection identifies sensitive entities such as credit card numbers or phone numbers.

reasoning.correct: PII detection identifies sensitive entities such as credit card numbers or phone numbers.

why_others_wrong.0: Azure OpenAI provides generative models but not built-in PII detection for text analytics pipelines.
why_others_wrong.2: Face API is for faces in images and video.
why_others_wrong.3: Face API is for faces in images and video.

questions.question: What capability identifies the key topics or important terms within a document?
questions.explanation: Key phrase extraction surfaces important terms.

reasoning.correct: Key phrase extraction surfaces important terms.

why_others_wrong.1: NER extracts named entities, not arbitrary key phrases.
why_others_wrong.2: Speech recognition is speech-to-text, not text analytics.
why_others_wrong.3: Speech recognition is speech-to-text, not text analytics.

questions.question: Identify the best choice approach best supports transparency for an AI system making eligibility decisions?
options: Provide user-facing explanations and documentation of limitations
questions.explanation: Transparency requires communicating how decisions are made, limitations, and user recourse.

reasoning.correct: Transparency requires communicating how decisions are made, limitations, and user recourse.

why_others_wrong.0: Withholding details reduces transparency.
why_others_wrong.2: Data minimization is privacy-related, not transparency.
why_others_wrong.3: Data minimization is privacy-related, not transparency.

questions.question: Select the correct answer term describes the target value the model is trained to predict?
questions.explanation: The label is the ground truth output in supervised learning.

reasoning.correct: The label is the ground truth output in supervised learning.

why_others_wrong.1: Noise refers to random variation in data.
why_others_wrong.2: Baseline is a simple reference model.
why_others_wrong.3: Baseline is a simple reference model.

questions.question: Choose the statement tasks are supported by Azure Automated ML?
questions.explanation: AutoML supports supervised tasks and forecasting.

reasoning.correct: AutoML supports supervised tasks and forecasting.

why_others_wrong.1: Reinforcement learning is not supported by Azure AutoML.
why_others_wrong.2: NAS for NLP is not an AutoML capability.
why_others_wrong.3: NAS for NLP is not an AutoML capability.

questions.question: Pick the option service would you use to determine the language of a short chat message?
questions.explanation: Language detection predicts the language of a text sample.

reasoning.correct: Language detection predicts the language of a text sample.

why_others_wrong.1: Sentiment predicts tone, not language.
why_others_wrong.2: Speech-to-text transcribes audio.
why_others_wrong.3: Speech-to-text transcribes audio.

questions.question: From the options below, which Azure service provides access to GPT family models for text generation and chat?
questions.explanation: Azure OpenAI provides access to large language models such as GPT and embeddings.

reasoning.correct: Azure OpenAI provides access to large language models such as GPT and embeddings.

why_others_wrong.1: LUIS is retired and replaced by Conversational Language Understanding.
why_others_wrong.2: Custom Vision is for images, not text generation.
why_others_wrong.3: Custom Vision is for images, not text generation.

questions.question: In this scenario, which policy helps prevent harmful content when using Azure OpenAI models?
options: Content filtering and safety system messages
questions.explanation: Content filters, safety parameters, and guidance mitigate harmful outputs.

reasoning.correct: Content filters, safety parameters, and guidance mitigate harmful outputs.

why_others_wrong.0: Disabling logs does not improve safety.
why_others_wrong.2: Model size alone does not ensure safety.
why_others_wrong.3: Model size alone does not ensure safety.

questions.question: Among these, which best describes supervised learning?
options: Learning from labeled examples to predict outcomes
Learning by trial and error via rewards
questions.explanation: Supervised learning uses labeled datasets to learn input-output mappings for classification or regression.

reasoning.correct: Supervised learning uses labeled datasets to learn input-output mappings for classification or regression.

why_others_wrong.1: Unsupervised learning finds structure without labels such as clusters.
why_others_wrong.2: Translation is a task leveraging language models, not a learning paradigm.
